command:
echo "=== SAKURA HEALTH via SSH to vm-hermes 192.168.0.202 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 "
echo '--- services ---'
systemctl list-units | grep -iE 'hermes|sakura|gateway|bot'
systemctl list-unit-files | grep -iE 'hermes|sakura'
echo '--- ports ---'
ss -tlnp | grep -E '8080|7600|443'
echo '--- processes ---'
ps aux | grep -iE 'hermes|node' | grep -v grep | head -10
echo '--- home dir ---'
ls /home/jose/
echo '--- .hermes dir ---'
ls /home/jose/.hermes/ 2>/dev/null
echo '--- env file ---'
cat /home/jose/.hermes/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -v TOKEN | grep -v KEY | grep -v SECRET
echo '--- service files ---'
find /etc/systemd /home/jose -name '*.service' 2>/dev/null | grep -v systemd/system/sysinit | head -20
echo '--- last hermes log ---'
ls /home/jose/.hermes/logs/ 2>/dev/null && tail -20 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30
" 2>&1

echo "=== REMY HEALTH via SSH to vm-openclaw 192.168.0.199 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 "
echo '--- services ---'
systemctl list-units | grep -iE 'openclaw|remy|claw'
systemctl list-unit-files | grep -iE 'openclaw|remy'
systemctl --user list-units 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'openclaw|remy|claw'
echo '--- ports ---'
ss -tlnp | grep -E '9119|8787|8788|443'
echo '--- processes ---'
ps aux | grep -iE 'openclaw|node' | grep -v grep | head -10
echo '--- home dir ---'
ls /home/jose/
echo '--- .openclaw dir ---'
ls /home/jose/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null
echo '--- openclaw config ---'
cat /home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(k,':',v) for k,v in d.items() if k not in ['token','apiKey','botToken']]" 2>/dev/null
echo '--- service files ---'
find /etc/systemd /home/jose -name '*.service' 2>/dev/null | grep -v systemd/system/sysinit | head -20
echo '--- socat ---'
ps aux | grep socat | grep -v grep
" 2>&1
